title: Form Limitations
excerpt:
Hi,

posts.author: jamesl555 (James Lynas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Are there any known limitations on the amount of forms that can be added to a Board? We’d like to use forms for a survey and send the same survey many times, with results in a different group each time. I’d like to look ahead and see if there is a maximum number of times we could do this on one board?

Thanks.

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jamesl555 !

While there is no limitation on the forms that you have on an account, there is a limitation on the number of submissions that can be send through the form. Since each submission on the form creates a new item on the board, that counts against your item limitations to a board. The Board limitation is 10,000 items/subitems.

Hope this helps!
